landing.description: Submit your startup or hackathon concept. Qoom deploys five specialized autonomous AI Agents working in parallel to compile risk maps, opportunities, and return an aggregated investment verdict.
landing.stackDesc: Five professional layers modeling risk, defensibility, viability, engineering complexity, and validation proxies.

MarketAgent.name: MarketAgent
MarketAgent.desc: Scans customer demand, target demographics, and TAM growth.
MarketAgent.behaviorDesc: Slow scanning grid terrain, mapping customer demand vectors...

CompetitionAgent.name: CompetitionAgent
CompetitionAgent.desc: Maps direct/indirect competitors and identifies defensive moats.
CompetitionAgent.behaviorDesc: Sharp radar threat sweeps, compiling direct rivalry metrics...

MonetizationAgent.name: MonetizationAgent
MonetizationAgent.desc: Engineers SaaS models, LTV/CAC dynamics, and revenue streams.
MonetizationAgent.behaviorDesc: Floating financial quotients, modeling LTV/CAC dynamics...

FeasibilityAgent.name: FeasibilityAgent
FeasibilityAgent.desc: Calculates engineering complexity, timelines, and legal compliance.
FeasibilityAgent.behaviorDesc: Tracing interactive circuit layers, analyzing build complexity...

ValidationAgent.name: ValidationAgent
ValidationAgent.desc: Designs lean validation runs, demand proxies, and test sheets.
ValidationAgent.behaviorDesc: Target scope interrogation swept, compiling proxy feedback...

auth.toggleToRegister: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.toggleToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

dashboard.title: Innovation Workspace
dashboard.sub: Manage, register, and evaluate your startup ideas.
dashboard.modalPitchPlaceholder: Describe target market, pricing, implementation challenges, core features, or potential validation tests...
dashboard.emptySub: Register your first startup or hackathon idea to trigger a multi-agent investment scan.

scan.timelineSub: Qoom is querying five independent autonomous evaluation channels. Review active dispatches:

analytics.title: Venture Analytics
analytics.sub: Meta-analysis of scanned concepts and aggregate performance matrices.
analytics.noDataSub: Register and scan startup concepts to compile historical analytics.

hud.interactiveMapDesc: Click or hover over any agent intelligence node to light up the active laser telemetry link and explore their specific dossier.
hud.insufficientDetails: The submitted pitch lacks sufficient structural details to run a high-fidelity investment scan.
hud.missingPillarsFooter: Updating your project description on the dashboard with these details will enable the investment agents to compile a robust, high-fidelity scan report.
hud.preflightFailure: Pre-flight filters failed due to incomplete structural pillars.
hud.consistencyError: Language consistency error detected. Regenerating output to English...
